leadText: The Heart Scale (Japanese: ハートのウロコ Heart Scale) is a type of item introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Ruby, Sapphire , and Emerald , Generations IV to VII , and Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , it can be given to a Move Reminder to teach one move to one Pokémon. In Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl, after using 10 Heart Scales total, the cost is permanently removed and the Move Reminder will continue to teach Pokémon moves for free.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A lovely scale. It is coveted by collectors. Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. FR LG A pretty, heart-shaped scale that is extremely rare. It glows faintly in the colors of a rainbow. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A pretty, heart-shaped scale that is extremely rare. It glows faintly in the colors of the rainbow. X Y OR AS A pretty, heart-shaped scale that is extremely rare. It glows faintly with all of the colors of the rainbow. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A pretty, heart-shaped scale that is extremely rare. Some people are happy to receive one. S V A pretty, heart-shaped scale that is extremely rare. Certain people are delighted to be given one of these.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Heart Scales are the shed scales of Luvdisc . In Alola , they can be obtained at the Vast Poni Canyon trial site, implying they can also be the shed scales of the Jangmo-o evolutionary line. This is further supported by the fact that Jangmo-o has a heart-shaped scale on its head. In Pokémon X and Y , the Heart Scale is incorrectly sorted in the Bag as an Evolution stone when the Bag is sorted by type, instead of as an exchangeable item.
